scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,green "npm run dev -w @ai-water-usage/server" "npm run dev -w @ai-water-usage/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ai-water-usage/shared && npm run build -w @ai-water-usage/server && npm run build -w @ai-water-usage/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @ai-water-usage/shared && npm run test -w @ai-water-usage/server && npm run test -w @ai-water-usage/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @ai-water-usage/shared && npm run lint -w @ai-water-usage/server && npm run lint -w @ai-water-usage/web
